g.text: LRU Architecture: Hashmap + Doubly Linked List

ul.li: Memory Alignment: Structs are padded to align with 64B cache lines to prevent false sharing during concurrent shard access.
Sharding Strategy: Uses $2^n$ shards (default 1024) to minimize mutex contention. Hash algorithm is FNV-1a.
Eviction Algorithm: Supports hybrid LRU-LFU or simple TTL-Lazy.
Safety: Uses sync.RWMutex per shard for concurrent-safe read/write operations.
